nasb.text: After these days Elizabeth his wife became pregnant, and she kept herself in seclusion for five months, saying,

esv.text: After these days his wife Elizabeth conceived, and for five months she kept herself hidden, saying,

cnv.text: 過了幾天，他妻子以利沙伯懷了孕，隱藏了五個月，說：

ccb.text: 不久，伊丽莎白果然怀了孕，她有五个月闭门不出。

csbs.text: 这些日子以后，他的妻子伊莉莎白怀了孕，隐居了五个月。她说：
